messages.subject: The R Journal, Volume 4, Issue 2
messages.body_plain:
Dear All,

The latest issue of The R Journal is now available
at http://journal.r-project.org/current.html

Thanks to everyone involved.

Martyn Plummer
Editor-in-Chief
